featured.headline: FEATURED APP
featured.title: Create with AI, effortlessly.
featured.subtitle: Vynix AI Studio brings powerful AI creation tools to your fingertips — generate, edit, and transform content on iOS and Android.

featured.headline: WELLNESS
featured.title: Track your mood, understand yourself.
featured.subtitle: MoodJot helps you build self-awareness through simple, daily mood journaling with beautiful insights and analytics.

apps.name: Vynix
apps.subtitle: AI Studio
apps.description: Vynix AI Studio — a powerful mobile AI creation platform for generating and transforming content with cutting-edge AI models.
apps.longDescription: Vynix AI Studio puts the power of AI in your pocket. Create stunning images, transform photos, generate text, and explore AI capabilities — all from your mobile device. Available on both iOS and Android with a beautiful, intuitive interface designed for creators.

apps.name: MoodJot
apps.subtitle: Mood Tracker Journal
apps.description: A beautiful mood tracking and journaling app that helps you build self-awareness through daily mood logging and insightful analytics.
apps.longDescription: MoodJot is a premium mood tracking and journaling app designed to help you understand your emotional patterns. Log your daily moods with a simple, delightful interface, add journal entries, and discover insights about your emotional well-being over time. Available on both iOS and Android.
features: Daily mood tracking with intuitive UI

apps.name: Glow Spin
apps.subtitle: Rhythm Reflex Game
apps.description: A mesmerizing rhythm reflex game where you spin, glow, and react to the beat. Test your reflexes in a visually stunning neon world.
apps.longDescription: Glow Spin is a fast-paced rhythm reflex game that challenges your timing and reaction skills. Navigate through glowing obstacles, match the beat, and achieve high scores in a visually stunning neon-lit environment. Simple to pick up, hard to master. Available on iOS and Android.

apps.name: Swipe Slip
apps.subtitle: Tunnel Runner Game
apps.description: A thrilling tunnel runner game where you swipe to dodge, slip through obstacles, and race through endless tunnels at breakneck speed.
apps.longDescription: Swipe Slip is an adrenaline-pumping tunnel runner game. Swipe to navigate through increasingly challenging tunnels, dodge obstacles, and push your reflexes to the limit. With smooth controls and fast-paced action, every run is a new challenge. Available on iOS and Android.

apps.name: Cosmic Meta AI
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Tech Blog
apps.description: Cosmic Meta AI delivers high-quality, AI-generated content on programming, AI, blockchain, cloud computing, and emerging technologies.
apps.longDescription: Cosmic Meta AI is a comprehensive technology platform covering artificial intelligence, programming best practices, blockchain, cloud computing, finance, and digital marketing. Featuring AI-generated articles, tools for text manipulation and conversion, crypto calculators, and a curated collection of resources for staying ahead in the fast-moving digital world.
features: AI, blockchain, and cloud computing coverage

apps.name: u2m.io
apps.subtitle: URL Shortener with Analytics
apps.description: A fast, developer-friendly URL shortener with QR code generation, click tracking analytics, and a public API.
apps.longDescription: u2m.io is a sleek URL shortening platform that turns long URLs into short, shareable links. Features include QR code generation for every shortened URL, click tracking and analytics dashboard, a public API with documentation for programmatic access, and bulk URL management. Built for developers and marketers who need reliable link shortening with insights.
features: QR code generation for every link
Bulk URL management via file upload

apps.name: Generic NFT Mint
apps.subtitle: Configurable NFT Minting Interface
apps.description: A production-ready, configurable NFT minting interface supporting multiple ERC-721 collections with multi-wallet and multi-network support.
apps.longDescription: Generic NFT Mint is a fully configurable NFT minting platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Deploy beautiful minting pages for any ERC-721 contract through a single configuration file. Supports MetaMask, WalletConnect, and multiple networks including Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, and Optimism. Features glass morphism UI, contract diagnostics, static export, and subdirectory deployment.
features: Static export for any web server

apps.name: World Monitor
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Global Intelligence Dashboard
apps.description: A real-time global intelligence dashboard aggregating news, geopolitical events, and infrastructure monitoring across 170+ curated feeds.
apps.longDescription: World Monitor is an AI-powered situational awareness platform that aggregates 170+ curated feeds across 15 categories. Features include 45+ toggleable data layers (conflicts, military bases, ports, undersea cables, cyber threats), AI-synthesized briefings with local LLM support, dual map engines (3D globe and WebGL flat map), Country Instability Index scoring, 21-language localization, and 70+ live video streams. Available as a native desktop app via Tauri and as a PWA.
features: 45+ toggleable data layers (conflicts, infrastructure, cyber threats)
AI-synthesized briefings with local LLM support
Dual map engines — 3D globe and WebGL flat map
Country Instability Index with live scoring

apps.name: Galactic Striker
apps.subtitle: AI-Generated Space Shooter
apps.description: A fully AI-generated Python space shooter with dynamic gameplay, extensive weapon systems, and 250 handcrafted levels.
apps.longDescription: Galactic Striker is an action-packed space shooter built with Python and Pygame, entirely generated with AI. Features 250 handcrafted levels with boss encounters every 25 levels, seven primary weapons plus missile systems and shields, multiple alien types with advanced AI pathfinding, power-ups, and three game modes (Campaign, Arcade, Practice). Built with sprite batching, quadtree collision detection, and dynamic audio mixing.
features: 7 primary weapons plus missiles and shields
Multiple alien types with advanced AI
Campaign, Arcade, and Practice game modes

apps.name: ASO Screenshot Generator
apps.subtitle: App Store Screenshot Automation
apps.description: Generate high-converting App Store and Google Play screenshots with device frames, benefit-driven headlines, and multi-language support.
apps.longDescription: ASO Screenshot Generator automates the creation of store-ready screenshots for iOS, Android, iPad, and Android tablets. Features a guided 6-phase workflow: configuration, benefit discovery, screenshot pairing, AI-enhanced generation via Gemini, showcase preview creation, and multi-language localization with cultural aesthetics. Supports English-first translation to any language with locale-specific visual touches.
features: 4 platform support (iOS, Android, iPad, Android tablet)
6-8 screenshots per platform with action-verb headlines
Gemini AI enhancement for professional output
Realistic device frames with smart text color
Works as CLI tool and Claude Code skill
